title: Less political content in feeds, Meta's clampdown less effective against extremists - Il Sole 24 ORE
description: News article from Il Sole 24 ORE

title: Secondo uno studio dell'università di Urbino l'algoritmo di Facebook ora punisce la politica ufficiale e premia gli estremisti antieuropei. Pd e FdI verso una legge bipartisan sulle piattaforme - Open
snippet: This article discusses a study by Fabio Giglietto from the University of Urbino analyzing the effects of Meta's algorithmic choices on the distribution of political content on Facebook, finding that the algorithm is less effective against extremists and that visibility of institutional politics has declined.
description: The article discusses a study by Fabio Giglietto from the University of Urbino analyzing the effects of Meta's algorithmic choices on the distribution of political content on Facebook.

title: Katharina Esau Was Awarded an ARC Discovery Early Career Researcher Award 2026 - Oncodaily
Il Premio Rimini Mundi a sette ambasciatori del congressuale - lapiazzarimini.it
Meet the speakers! - EUDTP 2025 - EuroTech Universities Alliance
snippet: Announces Fabio Giglietto as a speaker at the EU Digital Technologies and Policies conference. States that Fabio Giglietto researches disinformation dynamics, examining how false narratives spread across digital platforms and their societal impact and that his studies analyze computational methods for detecting coordinated manipulation campaigns.
description: This EuroTech Universities Alliance announcement confirms Fabio Giglietto as a speaker at the EUDTP 2025 conference, highlighting his research on disinformation dynamics and computational methods for detecting manipulation campaigns.

title: Agenda TSRC 2024 - AWS
snippet: Lists Fabio Giglietto as a speaker at the Trust and Safety Research Conference 2024, presenting on "Authentic or Artificial? AI's Impact on Verification".
description: The agenda for the Trust and Safety Research Conference 2024 (TSRC) lists Fabio Giglietto as a speaker. He is presenting on the impact of AI on verification, which falls within his area of expertise.
